subject: An armored humanoid figure (likely a goblin or warrior) being violently destroyed by molten fire, its metal helmet and equipment melting and exploding apart in a blaze of orange and yellow flame
description: A warrior figure stands at the center of a fiery cataclysm, its body and armor disintegrating into smoke and slag. The metal helmet — riveted, conical, with a downturned brim — tilts atop the figure as molten heat warps the form beneath. Blackened, charred limbs and armor shards splay outward as if mid-explosion. The flames glow vivid orange and yellow at the core, fading into smoky black at the edges. Sparks and embers fly. The composition is centered, almost symmetrical, with the destruction radiating outward from the figure.
foreground: armored humanoid figure being consumed by fire, metal helmet, blackened limbs, melting equipment, sparks and embers
background: billowing smoke and flame, indistinct dark fiery atmosphere
emotion: violent destruction; figure's form is too consumed to read expression — pure annihilation
